title: Visa Cover Letter
description: Applicant letter explaining purpose, dates, funding, ties, and attached documents.

title: Sponsorship Letter
description: Sponsor explains relationship, covered costs, source of funds, and attached proof.

title: Invitation Letter
description: Host/inviter letter for family, friend, business, or event visits.

title: Employer Support / Leave Letter
description: Employer confirms role, salary, leave dates, and return-to-work expectation.

title: Business Owner Introduction Letter
description: Self-employed/business owner letter explaining business activity and travel purpose.

title: Business Visa Invitation Letter
description: Inviting company letter with meeting purpose, dates, and cost responsibility.

title: Student Sponsorship Letter
description: Parent/guardian/company confirms tuition and living-cost support.

title: Medical Visa Support Letter
description: Patient/treatment letter referencing hospital appointment and funding.

title: Previous Refusal Explanation Letter
description: Evidence-based explanation of previous refusal and changed circumstances.

title: Minor Travel Consent Letter
description: Consent format for minors travelling with one parent/guardian.

title: Bank Statement Explanation Letter
description: Explains income source, large deposits, sponsorship transfers, or business cash flow.

title: Travel Itinerary Template
description: Day-by-day travel plan and flight/accommodation summary.

title: Document Checklist Template
description: Printable checklist users can organize by required/recommended/optional.

title: Company Support Letter
description: Company-sponsored travel letter for staff business trips.

title: Host Accommodation Letter
description: Host confirms accommodation for applicant during visit.
